description:
No spec subject — CI workflow configuration.

scripts/check_specs.sh passes no --base, so CI runs spec.check's default --base HEAD: changed_files=0, append-only guard explicitly skipped (append_only_applicable?(_, "HEAD") -> false), co-update/branch guards no-op. A PR deleting a must requirement or changing behavior without subject co-updates passes CI today. Only head-only checks (validation, verification commands, Overlap) run.

Fix: on pull_request events invoke check_specs.sh --base origin/main (ideally the PR merge base); keep the bare HEAD default for push-to-main and workflow_dispatch. actions/checkout@v4 is depth-1 by default, so add fetch-depth: 0 (or an explicit fetch of main) or the base ref won't exist. Depends on the event-trigger fix ticket (events must fire for the PR path to matter).

comments.text:
IMPLEMENTED
Session: specled_-dkh-ci-event-triggered-github (interactive implement session)
Log: interactive session, no delegated log file

Commit: 8e30724 on branch specled_-y1c/ci-pr-base (PR #4)
Files touched: .github/workflows/specs.yml
Tests added: none (CI workflow YAML; behavior proven by live CI run, see below)
Verification stubs flipped: none (no spec subject)
Verification tier: change-scoped — mix spec.check --no-run-commands and mix spec.check --base origin/main --no-run-commands locally in worktree (changed_files=1 findings=0); YAML parse check; live proof: PR #4 pull_request run 29968310586 executed 'check_specs.sh --base "origin/${GITHUB_BASE_REF}"' and logged 'branch base=origin/main changed_files=1 findings=0'. Full-system proof deferred to merge gate / PR CI (which is this very run).
Final-tier runs: 1

Summary: On pull_request events specs.yml now invokes check_specs.sh --base origin/$GITHUB_BASE_REF, so spec.check diffs the PR against its merge base (spec.check uses three-dot base...HEAD, satisfying the "ideally the PR merge base" note) and the append-only/co-update/branch guards apply to the PR diff instead of no-oping on --base HEAD. push-to-main and workflow_dispatch keep the bare default per ticket. actions/checkout now uses fetch-depth: 0 so the base ref exists in the runner.

VERIFY: PASS
Session: verify-y1c (delegated agent)
Log: delegated agent, no log path

Mechanical checks:
- Files touched: 1 (.github/workflows/specs.yml)
- Files outside Allowed globs: 0
- Files matching Out-of-Scope globs: 0 (ticket has no explicit Out-of-Scope/Allowed sections; sole file is squarely in the ticket's stated concern)

Semantic checks:
- Spec stubs run: 0, passed: 0 (no spec subject — CI workflow config, none expected)
- Requirements coverage:
  - pull_request diffs against origin/main: covered by specs.yml if-block (GITHUB_EVENT_NAME=pull_request -> check_specs.sh --base "origin/${GITHUB_BASE_REF}") + live CI run 29968310586 logging 'branch base=origin/main changed_files=1 findings=0'; change_analysis diff_against_base uses "base...HEAD" (three-dot merge base) and branch_check append_only_applicable? activates for a real base but returns false for "HEAD". Would fail if the branch were inverted/omitted: guard would no-op on --base HEAD (branch base=HEAD, changed_files=0). Seams: none.
  - push/workflow_dispatch keep bare default: covered by else branch (bash ./scripts/check_specs.sh, no --base). Would fail if all events got --base: dispatch has no GITHUB_BASE_REF, yielding 'origin/' (invalid ref) and a spec.check error. Seams: none.
  - fetch-depth must expose base ref: covered by actions/checkout@v4 with fetch-depth: 0 + CI checkout log '* [new branch] main -> origin/main'. Would fail under default depth-1 clone: origin/main unresolvable, spec.check errors. Seams: none.
- Intent-level scope concerns: none — diff touches only specs.yml; no unrelated changes.
- Targeted verification: PASS. Ran 'MIX_ENV=test mix spec.check --base origin/main --no-run-commands' in worktree -> exit 0, 'status=pass errors=0 warnings=0', 'branch base=origin/main changed_files=1 findings=0'. Read-only gh api on run 29968310586 confirmed real-CI PR path executed with 'branch base=origin/main'. No GitHub state mutated.
- Full-suite verification: not run by verifier (by design)

Verdict: PASS

Notes: scripts/check_specs.sh forwards "$@" to mix spec.check, so --base flows through unchanged; it was not modified this ticket, correctly. check_specs.sh passes the PR head ref rather than the exact merge-base SHA, but spec.check's three-dot base...HEAD semantics compute the merge base internally, satisfying the ticket's 'ideally the PR merge base' note. Ticket is BLOCKED BY specled_-dkh (event triggers must fire for the PR path to matter) — out of scope here.

APPROVED. Merged to main as b00e02b via PR #4 (squash); merge gates green locally (compile -w-as-e, format, deps.unlock, 1017 tests 0 failures) and spec.check green in PR CI run 29968310586 exercising the new --base path. Closing per auditor sign-off.

title: specs.yml: PR gate should run spec.check --base origin/main (needs fetch-depth: 0)
